name: Orca Security
description: Monitor Orca Security cloud security posture management for vulnerability and compliance findings

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Orca Security at https://app.us.orcasecurity.io
2. Go to Settings → API Tokens
3. Create a new token with read access
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Orca Security Settings → API Tokens

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Orca Security is actively scanning cloud environments for threats

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Orca Security users with access to cloud security findings
